cxu_object.claim: Rapid open-close cycles triggered by regime transitions (e.g., ranging→trending_up) generate significant fee drag with no realized P&L. When a position is opened and closed within the same regime-transition window, fees consume the entire trade value. Minimum hold time or regime-stability confirmation before entry should be considered to reduce churn.

supporting_contexts.text: Trade sequence on 2026-04-07: open_short at $2078.25 in ranging regime, immediately closed at $2083.65 when regime flipped to trending_up, then open_long at $2078.25. Total fees: $72.78 on ~$0 net P&L. The short was also directionally wrong (price moved up $5.40 against the short). Three trades, $72.78 in fees, zero realized gain.
